aboutUs.title: About the Company
aboutUs.description: KYOTO DIAMOND TOOLS UKRAINE is a young and promising company that manufactures superabrasive tools with increased performance and wear‑resistance requirements. The enterprise was founded in 2010 in Vyshhorod, Kyiv region, by the Japanese parent company Kyoto Diamond Industrial Co. Ltd. This company has a long history and supplies its tools to leading Japanese and European automotive, bearing, jewelry, and electrical engineering manufacturers worldwide. Our Ukrainian division produced and supplied diamond and CBN tools on organic bonds for Japanese machine‑building enterprises.
